nasb.text: The Lord also has a dispute with Judah, And will punish Jacob according to his ways; He will repay him according to his deeds.

esv.text: The Lord has an indictment against Judah and will punish Jacob according to his ways; he will repay him according to his deeds.

cnv.text: 耶和華與猶大爭辯； 他必照雅各所行的懲罰他， 按他所作的報應他。

ccb.text: 耶和华指控犹大； 要按雅各所行的惩罚他， 照雅各所做的报应他。
